violations.text: The prep unit was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were observed at Turkey 48 DF - Burgers 48DF - Chicken 48DF -Roasted Tomatoes 48 DF - Yogurt 45 DF - Meatballs 45 DF - Quinoa 45 DF - Egg Burritos 45 DF - Egg Sandwich 45 DF - Boiled Eggs 45 DF - Gorgonzola 45DF. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2026

Cheese was observed not date marked. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
